page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: EDHI643, EDPL643, or EDPS643.

Formerly: EDPL643.

EDHI650 Professional Seminar in Higher and Adult Education (3 Credits) Introduction to higher and adult education as a field of study. Origins, current dimensions and problems, and emerging issues. Field trips to state and national capitols, and involvement in professional conferences. Credit Only Granted for. EDHI650, EDPL650, or EDPS650.
